calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Lilyanne Kane.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:29 pm and concluding at 2:39 pm.

Plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA) NA is present represented by Scott Kennard, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Lilyanne Kane is not present.

Plaintiff's counsel makes Oral Motion to dismiss Doe Defendants.

The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's Oral Motion to Dismiss Doe Defendants.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintjiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA) NA, and against Defendant Lilyanne Kane, as follows:

1. Damages: $7,468.25
2. Costs: $315.05

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $7,783.30

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Continued To Aug-23-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Set For Trial On Aug-21-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
